scripts.codegen: orval --config ./orval.config.ts && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path'),root=path.resolve('..'),apiTs=fs.readFileSync(path.join(root,'api-zod/src/generated/api.ts'),'utf8'),apiExports=new Set(),matchAll=(s,re)=>{let m;while((m=re.exec(s)))apiExports.add(m[1]);},reEach=re=>{re.lastIndex=0;matchAll(apiTs,re);};reEach(/^export const (\w+)/gm);reEach(/^export type (\w+)/gm);const f=path.join(root,'api-zod/src/generated/types/index.ts'),c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8'),filtered=c.split('\n').filter(l=>{const m=l.match(/export \* from \"\.\/(.+)\"/);if(!m)return true;const n=m[1].charAt(0).toUpperCase()+m[1].slice(1);return!apiExports.has(n);}).join('\n');fs.writeFileSync(f,filtered);" && pnpm -w run typecheck:libs
